channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Fox News Politics: A New Trump in Town
item.description: The Fox News Politics newsletter, with the latest updates on the Trump transition, exclusive interviews and more Fox News politics content.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: House task force cites 'various failures' ahead of 'preventable' Trump shooting
item.description: The House select committee that investigated the two assassination attempts against President-elect Trump released a report on Tuesday that found the July 13 attack at Trump’s rally in Butler, Pa., was “preventable and should not have happened.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: As session nears, status of a Minnesota lawmaker facing criminal charges remains a flashpoint
item.description: Sen. Nicole Mitchell has upcoming court hearings in a burglary charge ahead of a trial that would start soon after 2025 Legislature gavels in. She’s resisting calls to step down, and a departure would leave the Senate knotted up.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: McConnell receives medical attention after falling
item.description: Senate Republican Leader Mitch McConnell (Ky.) received medical attention after falling following a Republican lunch meeting Tuesday. A spokesman for McConnell said the GOP leader tripped after the lunch. "He sustained a minor cut to the face and sprained his wrist.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Meet Natalie Harp, Trump's 'valuable resource' who lawmakers say is 'critical' to his operation
item.description: Lawmakers who communicate with President-elect Trump’s assistant Natalie Harp regularly told Fox News Digital that she is "critical" in ensuring Congress is a "real partner" for the incoming administration.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Justice Department ignored some policies when seizing reporters' phone records, watchdog finds
item.description: Federal prosecutors sidestepped some Justice Department rules when they seized the phone records of reporters as part of media leak investigations during the Trump administration, according to a new watchdog report being released as the aggressive practice of hunting for journalists’ sources could a
item.dc:creator: Eric Tucker And Alanna Durkin Richer, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Republican-led states are rolling out plans that could aid Trump's mass deportation effort
item.description: Governors and lawmakers in Republican-led states are rolling out plans that could aid President-elect Donald Trump's effort to deport millions of people living in the U.S. illegally.
item.dc:creator: David A. Lieb, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Supreme Court leans toward Utah oil railway plan, but may not make broad environmental ruling
item.description: The Supreme Court seemed to favor a Utah oil railroad expansion in arguments on Tuesday, but appeared more skeptical of putting strict new limits on a key national environmental law.
item.dc:creator: Lindsay Whitehurst, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump nominates Rodney Scott to lead Customs and Border Protection
item.description: Rodney Scott at CBP and Caleb Vitello at ICE would work alongside Stephen Miller, who was named deputy chief of staff for policy and Tom Homan, also tapped to be a "border czar.
item.dc:creator: Sergio Martínez-Beltrán, MPR News

item.title: Minneapolis City Council member Emily Koski joins mayor’s race
item.description: She joins Minnesota DFL Sen. Omar Fateh and the Rev. DeWayne Davis of Plymouth Congregational Church in challenging Mayor Jacob Frey, who’s running for reelection.
item.dc:creator: Megan Burks, MPR News

item.title: Trump criticizes Chronister after sheriff's withdrawal, days after praising him
item.description: President Donald Trump challenged reports of Hillsborough County Sheriff Chad Chronister's DEA withdrawal, saying he didn't want the sheriff days his cabinet days after nominating him.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Rodriguez, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Majority of Supreme Court seems reluctant to block state bans on medical treatments for minors
item.description: Hearing a high-profile culture-war clash, a majority of the Supreme Court seemed reluctant Wednesday to block Tennessee’s ban on gender-affirming care for minors.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Montana lawmakers cross the aisle to block a trans bathroom ban in the state capitol
item.description: Some Republicans joined Democrats in rejecting the measure, which would have restricted bathroom access. Rep. Zooey Zephyr, Montana's first openly transgender legislator, won a second term last month.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman, MPR News

item.title: Pete Hegseth’s mother says The New York Times made ‘threats’ by asking her to comment on a story
item.description: A basic tenet of journalism — calling someone for comment on a story — was seen as a threat by defense secretary nominee Pete Hegseth’s mother.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Condo deadline looms: Owners must confront years of neglect
item.description: The condo conundrum continues as the December 31st inspection deadline is only a few weeks away. State lawmakers promise action on the issue next session, but the clock is ticking.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC
